title: alchemilla pubescens var. plicata
intro: Alchemilla pubescens var. plicata, also known as the Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a variety of the Alchemilla pubescens plant, a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla pubescens var. plicata are said to offer health benefits such as reducing swelling and pain, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and other minor health issues.
